title: Analyze original wall-of-code file
description: Open starter_wall_of_code_vegas_trip_planner.py and analyze all functions. Identify logical categories of functionality such as greeting, user input collection, transportation input, cost calculations, summary output, and orchestration logic.
expected_output: Codex understands the functional groupings in the original file.

title: Insert high-level comments in original file
description: Modify starter_wall_of_code_vegas_trip_planner.py by inserting comment headers separating the code into logical sections: Greeting, Input Functions, Transportation Input, Cost Calculations, Output Functions, and Program Orchestration.
expected_output: Original file clearly labeled with section comments.

title: Create modular project structure
description: Create a clean project layout including src directory and module files that will contain refactored code.
expected_output: Directory structure created with empty modules.

title: Move greeting functionality into greeting module
description: Extract the print_greeting() function from the original file and place it into trip_greeting.py.

title: Move general input functions into trip_inputs module
description: Move traveler count, trip length, hotel price, room count, and food cost functions into trip_inputs.py.
expected_output: trip_inputs.py contains general trip input prompts.

title: Move transportation input functions
description: Move travel method selection, driving distance, mpg, fuel price, and plane ticket price functions into transportation_inputs.py.

title: Move entertainment and extra budget inputs
description: Move gambling loss, souvenirs, emergency fund, parking tickets, vehicle maintenance, entertainment budget, and local transportation functions into budget_inputs.py.

title: Move calculation logic into calculation module
description: Move all calculation functions such as fuel cost, lodging cost, food cost, parking cost, miscellaneous cost, total trip cost, and cost per person into trip_calculations.py.

title: Move summary printing logic
expected_output: trip_summary.py contains functions responsible for displaying results.

title: Create program orchestrator main.py
description: Create main.py that imports modules and orchestrates the full program flow. It should call greeting, collect inputs, perform calculations, and print the summary.
expected_output: main.py clearly shows the high-level execution flow of the application.

title: Ensure modules import correctly
description: Update imports across modules so that functions are referenced correctly and the program runs from main.py.
expected_output: Running python main.py successfully runs the Vegas Trip Planner.

title: Create unit test directory
description: Create tests folder for pytest-based unit tests.

title: Write unit tests for calculation module
description: Create tests/test_calculations.py that verifies fuel cost, lodging cost, food cost, parking cost, total trip cost, and cost per person calculations.

title: Write unit tests for transportation logic
description: Create tests/test_transportation.py verifying driving and flying cost selection.

title: Write unit tests for miscellaneous cost logic
description: Create tests/test_miscellaneous.py verifying vehicle maintenance and parking ticket calculations.

title: Run pytest test suite
description: Execute pytest and ensure all modules import correctly and tests pass.
